form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 5th (Fr3) over 2300m at this track beaten 24 m by Maestro (2:50.10) in NR up to 65 on March 24 at $26. Before that 5th (Fr5) over 1740m after showing early speed and racing wide at Bankstown, beaten 21 m by Second To Nun (2:14.10) in NR up to 56 on March 16 at $3. Must improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked between the 900 and 700m behind the weakening Hot To Trot.
Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 6th (Fr4) over 2300m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was leading 4.46 beaten 30 m by Maestro (2:50.10) in NR up to 65 on March 24 at $4. Two runs back 8th (Fr3) over 2300m at this track, at the bell was leading 4.1m on the pegs beaten 13 m by Should Beabarca (2:50.90) in NR up to 64 on December 8 at $2.10. Expect to see a much better run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 50m hung out under pressure.
Inconvenienced passing the 400m when One Pinevale Hill broke gait.
Negotiating the first turn became unbalanced and broke gait.
Hung out under pressure in the home straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Seven-year-old mare resumed in good form good run when 3rd (Fr5) over 1609m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 3rd-4.74 beaten 5.5 m by Alpha Stride (1:55.50) in NR up to 72 on March 31 at $17. Should improve so expected to run well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped out.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track, beaten 35 m by Mister Blindside (1:54.80) in NR up to 74 on March 3 at $61. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 3rd (Fr6) over 2300m at this track, at the bell was 6th-14.24 beaten 7 m by Valley Star (2:49.60) in NR up to 66 on February 24 at $8.50. Will not find this easy. Can do better.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (FT Fr3) over 2300m at this track, beaten 24 m by Rakero Blaze (2:52.10) in No NR on March 27 at $61. form.formComment: Won three starts back at Melton over 1720m LR NR 56 to 75 M on February 28. Last start 4th (Fr6) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track, at the bell was leading 2.23 beaten 8 m by Alpha Stride (1:55.50) in NR up to 72 on March 31 at $7. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to leave the pre-race circle and was out of position at the start.
Hung in under pressure momentarily at the finish line.
Failed to be in position at the candy pole.
Began badly. Held up for clear running rounding the final turn.
Checked and broke near the 300m.
Out of position when the start was initiated.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week. Lacklustre first-up performance when 6th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track was 7th-14.49 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Alpha Stride (1:55.50) in NR up to 72 on March 31 at $51. Not this time.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start won by 5 m (Fr3) at this track (1:55.50) beating Maximus Meridius in NR up to 72 on March 31 at $6.50 at the bell was 5th-9.89. In fine form and looks a serious player again.
